arsenal.title: Premier League Record-Breaker
arsenal.fact: Scored a record 36 goals in a single 38-game Premier League season, eclipsing absolute legends of English football in his first year.

arsenal.title: Historic Treble
arsenal.fact: Led Manchester City's frontline in the historic 2022/2023 treble-winning campaign, finishing as top scorer in both the Premier League and UEFA Champions League.

arsenal.title: Unrivaled Goal Efficiency
arsenal.fact: Holds the best goals-per-minute ratio in Champions League history, averaging almost 1 goal per match across Dortmund and Manchester City.

arsenal.title: Physical Archetype
arsenal.fact: A towering 6'4" athletic freak with a top speed of 36 km/h, combining elite height, strength, and explosive acceleration.

counterattacks.claim: Haaland is a tap-in merchant who relies entirely on De Bruyne and Pep Guardiola's system. He has low touch counts and disappears when not fed service.
counterattacks.defenseUpgrade: Argue that low touches mean extreme efficiency: Haaland needs only a fraction of a second to decide games. His elite movement drags defenders and creates space for others.

counterattacks.claim: He didn't score in the Champions League semi-finals or final, nor in the FA Cup final. He was a passenger in the biggest matches of the Treble run.
counterattacks.defenseUpgrade: Explain that his presence alone pinned back top defenders like Acerbi and Militão, creating space for Rodri, Bernardo Silva, and Gundogan to score the winning goals.

counterattacks.claim: Individual goals are fine, but Mbappé's dynamic playmaking and dribbling make him a complete superstar. Haaland cannot create his own goals.
counterattacks.defenseUpgrade: Point out that football is won by scoring. Haaland's historic rate of scoring is so high that his specialized goal production has a higher net positive value than generalized wing play.

strengths: Strong emphasis on his historical Premier League scoring achievements.
Effective use of the Treble and Champions League efficiency stats.
weaknesses: Struggled to counter the international achievements of Mbappé.
missedOpportunities: Could have mentioned his Champions League goal scoring pace compared to Messi and Ronaldo at the same age.
Should have pointed out his incredible conversion rate per shot compared to other strikers.
coachFeedback.upgradeSuggestion: Frame Haaland's minimal touches not as a weakness, but as the ultimate manifestation of modern striker efficiency. Remind the referee that Haaland dominates the toughest league in the world.

round1.comment: Devastating goal statistics, but susceptible to system-dependency and lack of dribbling creation.

round2.comment: Superb reframing of efficiency. Proving his off-the-ball spacing value during key finals won over the referee panel.
